Now Hiring – Bhimavaram / West Godavari

Medical Representative Jobs in Bhimavaram, West Godavari

Crasenim Pharma is actively hiring Medical Representatives in Bhimavaram, one of West Godavari's busiest and most commercially vibrant pharma markets. Full-time MR roles and commission-based field sales positions are available now covering Bhimavaram city and surrounding sub-territories including Narsapur, Palacole, and Undi.

📍 Bhimavaram, Narsapur, Palacole 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 1–4 Years Experience Preferred
💬 Apply via WhatsApp All Openings
Territory

Bhimavaram Pharma Market Overview

Bhimavaram is one of West Godavari's most commercially active pharma markets. The town hosts a dense network of GPs, specialist clinics, and retail pharmacies, with consistently high prescription volumes across antibiotic, gastric, and cardiac categories. Its status as a regional commercial hub means that MRs here benefit from concentrated doctor density and shorter travel times between calls.

The assigned MR territory covers Bhimavaram city along with the Narsapur, Palacole, and Undi sub-areas — all well-connected by road and offering meaningful prescription opportunity for a disciplined field sales professional.

Key Markets – Bhimavaram Territory

Bhimavaram (HQ), Narsapur, Palacole, Undi, Achanta, Mogalthur

  • Busy town market with high footfall and strong retail pharmacy density
  • Established GP and specialist network across Bhimavaram city
  • Strong gastric and antibiotic prescription demand in the territory
  • Less competitive than large metros — easier to build doctor relationships
  • Quick career progression possible for consistent performers
  • Full product training and detailing support from Crasenim Pharma HQ
Job Openings

Pharma Vacancies in Bhimavaram & West Godavari

Medical Representative – Bhimavaram, West Godavari
📍 Bhimavaram, West Godavari💼 Full-Time🕒 1–3 Years
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma's portfolio to GPs, specialists, and pharmacies across Bhimavaram
  • Cover Bhimavaram city and assigned sub-territories such as Narsapur or Palacole
  • Competitive salary + travel allowance + monthly performance incentives
  • Regular product knowledge training, detailing aids, and field support provided
Commission-Based MR – Bhimavaram / Narsapur / Undi
📍 Bhimavaram / Narsapur / Undi💼 Commission🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn monthly commission on prescriptions generated for Crasenim Pharma in the Bhimavaram area
  • Cover your preferred sub-territory — Narsapur, Palacole, Undi, or Bhimavaram city
  • No investment required — immediate start for candidates with local pharma doctor networks
  • Monthly incentive bonuses for consistent target achievement and prescription growth
FAQs

Pharma MR Jobs in Bhimavaram – FAQ

Are MR jobs in Bhimavaram currently available at Crasenim Pharma?
Yes. We have active openings for both full-time Medical Representatives and commission-based field sales professionals in Bhimavaram. Candidates with local pharma experience or an established doctor network in West Godavari are encouraged to apply immediately.
What products will I be promoting as an MR in Bhimavaram?
You will promote our complete WHO GMP certified portfolio including Amoxsenim-CV 625 (antibiotic), Pansenim-DSR (gastric), Telsenim-40 Smartdose™ (cardiac), Metsenim-G Smartdose™ (diabetes), Crasenim-LC, and Crasenim Bar — all manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS.
How can I apply for a pharma MR job in Bhimavaram?
WhatsApp your name, experience, and preferred territory to +91 99890 74806, email us at crasenimpharma@gmail.com, or complete the application form on our Careers page.
